title: PlatformContext
description: Context object passed to every block via the context prop.

props.name: isPreview
props.description: Whether the page is in draft/preview mode

props.name: auth
props.description: Authentication state — available when memberAuth is enabled

props.name: i18n
props.description: Internationalization context with enabled languages and current language

props.name: localizeHref
props.description: Build localized href for internal links with language prefix
